content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于3月27日15:50(UTC+8) 进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯×50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2026年4月10日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【更新内容】
一、活动
【幻衣活动：旺达·钩吻葬盛】
● 在 4 月 6 日 9:00 至 4 月 20 日 9:00 期间，幻衣活动「钩吻葬盛」限时开放！
    ○ 活动期间，完成任务累计可获得：「无垢之芯」×10，以及全新 1 ☆ 幻衣「旺达·钩吻葬盛」。
    ○ 活动结束后，「旺达·钩吻葬盛」将在「幻衣订购」中上架，价格为「源液」×680。
 
二、问题修复
● 修复了玩法活动「燃烧的群宴·复刻」中，共鸣激活材料「享乐之心」详细信息的图标错误的问题。
● 修复了「相位对弈」中，在「密码对战」有一方投降后，无法邀请对方进行「友谊赛」的问题。
● 修复了在网络状况不佳的情况下，登录时可能会卡在更新内容检测的问题，现在超时后会提示守密人稍后重试。
 
三、本地化
● 修复了在简体中文以外的语言设置下，玩法活动「燃烧的群宴」及「相位逆转」界面中，部分文本溢出导致显示不全的问题。
● 修复了在简体中文以外的语言设置下，战斗中护盾、中毒等部分状态变化时，数值与状态名称之间缺少空格的问题。

**V2.4.3.5 Online Maintenance Announcement**

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on March 27 at 15:50(UTC+8) . You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
  
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver×50
  
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on April 10, 2026 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
  
[Update Content]
1. Event
[Costume Event: Wanda·With Spikenard and Myrrh]
● During the period from April 6 at 9:00 to April 20 at 9:00, the Phantom Attire event "With Spikenard and Myrrh" is available for a limited time
  ○ During the event, completing missions can earn you a total of: "Pure Core" ×10, and the all-new 1 ☆ Phantasia "Wanda·With Spikenard and Myrrh".
  ○ After the event ends, "Wanda·With Spikenard and Myrrh" will be available in "Garment Ordering" at a price of "Silver Prime" ×680.

2. Bug Fixes
● Fixed an issue in the gameplay event "Feast of Flames: Rerun" where the icon for the Resonance activation material "Heart of Hedonism" displayed incorrectly in its detail information.
● Fixed an issue in "Traphase" where, after one side surrendered in "Password Mode," it was impossible to invite the other party to a "Friendly Match."
● Fixed an issue where, under poor network conditions, the login process could get stuck during content update detection. Players will now be prompted to retry Later after a timeout.

3. Localization
● Fixed an issue where, under language settings other than Simplified Chinese, some text overflow caused incomplete display in the gameplay event interfaces "Feast of Flames" and "Phase Reversal".
● Fixed an issue where, in language settings other than Simplified Chinese, a space was missing between the value and the state name when states such as Shield and Poison changed during battle.
